findings.problem: The June scene keeps restating the chapter's thesis after the scene has already made it legible: the money will now be 'in the room,' Lena must not pretend her 'thumb slipped,' the transfer is 'real,' and the green check mark must be remembered if Friday 'gets cute.' That repeated naming of the same moral turn over-manages reader interpretation and slightly blunts the queasy inevitability the chapter has otherwise earned.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the debate and immediate aftermath around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:265, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:279, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:319, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:405, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:411 so the relationship shift is stated directly only once. Replace at least two of the thesis-forward lines with observable pressure: changed handling of the phone, altered eye contact, silence, or a more materially awkward departure that lets the transfer's new leverage register without being paraphrased for the reader.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised material replacing snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:265, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:279, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:319, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:405, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:411 contains only one explicit verbalization that the money has changed the relationship, and the post-transfer beat shows the shift through action or silence before any abstract summary. Fail if two or more lines still paraphrase the same idea in thesis language.

findings.problem: The narration leans too often on the same fragment-and-gloss habits: standalone negation beats ('Not a text,' 'Not literally,' 'Not an ask,' 'Not cruel,' 'Not polished') and meta-labeling of dialogue ('The sentence landed,' 'The sentence was so close,' 'The line landed hard'). Because those constructions recur well past the twice-is-a-coincidence threshold, they start to sound like authorial defaults rather than pressure-shaped thought, flattening stretches that should feel more improvisatory and embodied.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the recurring formulas at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:23, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:31, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:93, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:113, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:139, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:223, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:261, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:295, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:393. Keep the meaning, but vary syntax and let Lena's body, soundscape, or next action carry the beat instead of repeated 'Not ...' fragments or narrator labels for what a line supposedly did.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passages replacing snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:23, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:93, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:113, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:139, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:223, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:261, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:295, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_05.md:393 leave no more than two standalone 'Not ...' fragment sentences in the whole chapter and no more than one narrator gloss using 'the line,' 'the sentence,' or equivalent labeling for dialogue effect. Fail if the same fragment-and-label pattern remains audible three or more times.

summary: Continuity, tense, scene causality, and character idiolects all hold, and the chapter keeps money shame concrete rather than sanitized. It still falls short of award/prose pass because the June scene restates the transfer's meaning too many times and the narration relies on a repeated fragment-and-gloss formula that becomes audible as a tic.
